hero.title: RF Online Next Wiki
hero.description: RF ONLINE NEXT is a cross-platform sci-fi MMORPG with Biosuit class swapping, Sacred Weapons, MAU and Animus combat, world boss raids, massive PvP, and PC/mobile play.

gameFeature.title: RF Online Next Gameplay
gameFeature.description: Master Biosuit class swapping, Sacred Weapons like MAU and Animus, world boss raids, and massive PvP in this cross-platform sci-fi MMORPG.

rfOnlineNextDownloadPlatforms.title: RF Online Next Download, Release Date and Platforms
rfOnlineNextDownloadPlatforms.intro: RF Online Next launched worldwide on June 16, 2026 for PC and mobile. Pick one official platform to install the real game and skip third-party APK mirrors or copied launcher pages.

cards.name: Official Site and Netmarble Launcher
cards.description: Official global download hub for the Netmarble Launcher PC version with Netmarble Connect remote play support.

cards.name: Epic Games Store
cards.description: Free base game on the Epic Games Store. Cross Platform, MMO, Open World, RPG, and Space.

cards.name: Google Play
cards.description: Official Android install page with 500K+ downloads. Role-playing MMORPG with competitive multiplayer.

cards.name: App Store
cards.description: Official iPhone and iPad install page. Requires iOS 15.0 or later. Version 1.27.12, 392.5 MB.

cards.name: PC System Requirements
cards.description: Minimum specs start at an Intel i5 8400, 12 GB RAM, and GTX 1060. Recommended steps up to an i5 12400, 16 GB, and RTX 2060.

cards.name: Supported Languages
cards.description: Audio in Korean and English. Text support spans 16 languages including Simplified and Traditional Chinese, French, German, and Japanese.

rfOnlineNextCodesRewards.title: RF Online Next Codes and Coupon Rewards
rfOnlineNextCodesRewards.intro: Track the official coupon page, launch rewards, Twitch Drops, Discord events, and partner campaigns. Coupon rewards are tied to your account membership number and delivered to the in-game mailbox.

cards.name: Official Coupon Center
cards.reward: Exclusive coupon rewards delivered to your linked account mailbox
cards.description: Enter the coupon on Netmarble's RF Online Next coupon page and confirm your account membership number before redeeming.
cards.note: One redemption per account. Restart the game and recheck the mailbox if the reward is delayed.

cards.name: Twitch Drops Event
cards.reward: Twitch Drops for watching official RF Online Next streams
cards.description: Log into your game account first, then log into Twitch and watch eligible RF Online Next streams.
cards.note: Event runs June 17 to June 30, 2026 14:59 UTC.

cards.name: App Marketplace Pre-registration Rewards
cards.reward: Rare Biosuit Summon Ticket, Uncommon Rover summon tickets, and Combat Support Packages
cards.description: Pre-registration through Google Play or the App Store qualified your account for launch rewards.
cards.note: Delivered via in-game mail at launch.

cards.name: Official Website Email Rewards
cards.reward: Epic Rover Flora Summon Chest, in-game credits, upgrade kits, and progression items
cards.description: Email pre-registration through the official website qualified your account for the website reward set.
cards.note: Delivered through the game account reward system.

cards.name: Discord Invite Event
cards.description: Join the RF Online Next Official Discord and follow the invite event instructions from the official forum notice.
cards.note: Announced May 28, 2026. Remain in the server until rewards are distributed.

cards.name: RF Online Next x GearUP Partnership
cards.description: Use the official Netmarble forum event notice and follow the GearUP campaign steps listed there.

rfOnlineNextBeginnerGuide.title: RF Online Next Beginner Guide
rfOnlineNextBeginnerGuide.intro: Follow the early path from account setup to flight, Biosuit equipping, Sacred Weapon deployment, level 30, and regional main quests. Keep the first hour simple and stay on official platforms.

steps.title: Install from an official platform
steps.subtitle: Netmarble Launcher, Epic Games Store, Google Play, or App Store
steps.description: PC players install through Netmarble Launcher or Epic Games Store. Mobile players use Google Play or the App Store so the account and purchase flow stay inside the official ecosystem.

steps.title: Create your game account and character
steps.subtitle: Pick your region, then the character you will keep
steps.description: Choose the same server as friends or guildmates before committing early progress, because MMO server choice affects who you can reliably play with.

steps.title: Set up PC controls before fighting
steps.subtitle: WASD to move, Space Bar to fly
steps.description: Alt + Enter or F11 toggles full screen and windowed mode. Adjust graphics quality from Settings then Environment.

steps.title: Reach level 5
steps.subtitle: Clear the opening quests
steps.description: The Great Beginning achievement marks level 5, the first clean early-progression checkpoint in RF Online Next.

steps.title: Finish the Biosuit Flight Tutorial
steps.subtitle: Complete the Colleague in Danger quest
steps.description: This unlock path teaches the flight system, which matters because Biosuits fight across both air and ground.

steps.title: Complete the Biosuit Equipping Tutorial
steps.subtitle: Complete the Bellato's Ammunition Depot quest
steps.description: Your first major step into RF Online Next's class-switching system, where Biosuits change combat style without restarting the character.

steps.title: Clear the Ancient Ruins objective
steps.subtitle: Defeat the Holy Stone Keeper
steps.description: This early boss checkpoint confirms your character can handle tutorial combat, movement, and objective progression.

steps.title: Deploy Sacred Weapons
steps.subtitle: Deploy Sacred Weapons five times
steps.description: Sacred Weapons include battlefield tools such as the Launcher, MAU, and Animus, central to RF Online Next's large-scale combat identity.

steps.title: Push to level 30 and regional main quests
steps.subtitle: Head toward Dorian, Numerus, and Kallis
steps.description: Valiant Mercenary marks level 30. Regional achievements track the Bellato, Cora, and Accretia quest lines.

quickTips: Always install RF Online Next from an official platform to keep your account safe.
Match your server choice with friends and guildmates early.
Finish the flight and Biosuit tutorials before deep PvE or PvP.
Save Sacred Weapon deployments for the fights that need them most.

rfOnlineNextBiosuitTierList.title: RF Online Next Class Tier List and Biosuits
rfOnlineNextBiosuitTierList.intro: Biosuits are RF Online Next's class system, supporting flight, air-and-ground combat, and on-the-fly role switching. This tier grid ranks Biosuits for new-player comfort and practical early usefulness, while showing what each suit does in PvE and large-scale PvP.

biosuits.name: Demolisher
biosuits.pve: Mob clearing, field farming, dungeon waves
biosuits.note: Built around heavy weaponry and area damage, the cleanest first pick for strong output without standing in melee.

biosuits.name: Punisher
biosuits.role: Stable ranged damage and ally cover
biosuits.pvp: Cover fire, crowd control, ranged finishing
biosuits.note: Focuses on bullets, flames, and covering allies, a safer damage style before full flight and PvP positioning.

biosuits.name: Enforcer
biosuits.pve: Survival, multi-enemy pulls, safer boss learning
biosuits.note: Engages multiple enemies and blocks attacks, ideal for durability and team protection.

biosuits.name: Dreadnought
biosuits.pvp: Chasing targets, combo pressure, frontline damage
biosuits.note: For players who charge in and stay aggressive, though melee positioning is less forgiving than ranged starters.

biosuits.name: Psypher
biosuits.note: Uses Force to control fights and handle multiple enemies, strong once you understand skill timing.

biosuits.name: Technician
biosuits.note: Important in party battles, but solo beginners usually progress faster with a damage Biosuit first.

biosuits.name: Phantom
biosuits.note: Speed and assassination value, but it punishes poor timing and positioning.

biosuits.name: Arbiter
biosuits.pve: Hybrid damage routes, flexible quest combat
biosuits.note: A flexible combat pick rather than the simplest starter, because hybrid range asks for careful positioning.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about RF Online Next

questions.question: What is RF Online Next?
questions.answer: RF Online Next is Netmarble's cross-platform sci-fi MMORPG, built around Biosuit class switching, Sacred Weapons, world boss raids, and large-scale PvP across PC and mobile.

questions.question: Where can I download RF Online Next?
questions.answer: Download RF Online Next from the official Netmarble site, Epic Games Store, Google Play, or the App Store. Use these official platforms to keep your account safe.

questions.question: Is RF Online Next free to play?
questions.answer: Yes. RF Online Next is free-to-play on PC and mobile with optional in-app purchases for cosmetics and progression items.

questions.question: How do I redeem RF Online Next coupon codes?
questions.answer: Enter coupons on Netmarble's official RF Online Next coupon page, confirm your account membership number, and rewards are delivered to your in-game mailbox.

questions.question: Does RF Online Next support cross-platform play?
questions.answer: Yes. RF Online Next supports cross-platform play between PC and mobile, so you can progress the same account across devices.

questions.question: What are Biosuits in RF Online Next?
questions.answer: Biosuits are RF Online Next's class system. They support flight, air-and-ground combat, and let you switch combat roles without restarting your character.
